How clean are Orange County's restaurants?62% of the 915 we grade hold an A, led by SHAMU MARKETPLACE SOUTH at 100/100. 86 sit at D or F.

Orange County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Orange County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 915 Orange County restaurants we grade, 568 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Orange County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Orange County?

We currently publish 915 graded restaurants in Orange County, with an average diner rating of 4.3 stars; 568 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
